file_insights.purpose: End-to-end integration tests for full content lifecycle
key_test_groups: Error handling for missing API keys and invalid models

patterns_discovered.description: Tests verify complete workflow from content creation through publication with version tracking
patterns_discovered.example: test_full_lifecycle_short_video transitions content through draft→validated→scheduled→published states

patterns_discovered.description: Parameterized tests with Portuguese text samples ensuring ã, õ, ç, é, á, â characters persist through all operations
patterns_discovered.example: PORTUGUESE_TEXTS parameter list with 5 different Portuguese phrases tested in create, update, and list operations

patterns_discovered.description: Systematic testing of all invalid state transitions to enforce content workflow rules
patterns_discovered.example: Multiple test methods ensuring draft→scheduled rejected, validated→published rejected, published→scheduled rejected

patterns_discovered.description: Comprehensive error handling verification including non-existent resources, invalid models, and premature scheduling
Tests verify dashboard summary accurately reflects current content state and counts across statuses and types
patterns_discovered.example: test_dashboard_counts_update creates items in various states and validates corresponding status_counts

gotchas_discovered.description: Portuguese special characters must round-trip correctly through database and API layers without corruption
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Explicit parameterized tests verify characters survive create, update, and list operations

gotchas_discovered.description: Content cannot skip states (e.g., draft→published directly) or move backward (e.g., published→scheduled)
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: TestInvalidStatusTransitions class systematically tests all forbidden transitions returning 400

gotchas_discovered.description: Attempting to schedule content that hasn't been validated returns 400, not 422 or other status
Some endpoints return either 400 or 404 for not-found scenarios, requiring flexible assertions
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tests use 'assert resp.status_code in (400, 404)' for flexible error handling

gotchas_discovered.description: Version endpoint returns only 2 snapshots (original + first edit) not full history of all 3 edits
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: test_lifecycle_with_versioning expects len(versions) == 2 despite 3 total updates

approach_details.strategy: Built comprehensive test suite covering happy path, error paths, and internationalization
approach_details.coverage: 8 test classes with 30+ individual test methods covering lifecycle, Portuguese chars, error handling, status transitions, scheduling, dashboard, and validation
approach_details.organization: Tests organized by concern (lifecycle, Portuguese chars, errors, transitions, scheduling, dashboard, validation) with helper methods reducing duplication
approach_details.async_support: All tests properly marked with @pytest.mark.asyncio and use AsyncClient for realistic HTTP simulation

recommendations.rationale: Tests reference NotebookLM API and AI generation but don't mock these external services, risking flaky tests
recommendations.implementation: Use @patch decorator to mock AIService and external API calls in test setup

recommendations.recommendation: Implement test data factories or fixtures
recommendations.rationale: Content creation is repeated 15+ times inline; factory pattern would improve maintainability
recommendations.implementation: Create @pytest.fixture for common content creation patterns with Portuguese text variants

recommendations.rationale: List endpoints tested but not pagination, filtering, or sorting behavior

recommendations.recommendation: Test concurrent operations and race conditions
recommendations.rationale: No tests for simultaneous edits, scheduling conflicts, or concurrent status changes
recommendations.implementation: Use asyncio.gather to run parallel operations and verify consistency

recommendations.recommendation: Add performance/load tests for bulk operations
recommendations.rationale: Current tests single or small batches; no verification of performance at scale
recommendations.implementation: Add stress test class creating 1000+ items and verifying dashboard response time
